properties.mission: Provide a focused suite of retail banking products for UK consumer customers

properties.definition: Flexible, easy-access savings product

properties.what_it_measures: Number of currently active savings accounts
Total number of customers
Mean balance across active accounts
Total monetary value of the product portfolio

properties.definition: A deposit product launched for general consumers aged 18 and over.
properties.regulatory_significance: Classified as a deposit product under FCA COBS regulations.

properties.definition: A regulatory classification for savings offerings subject to FCA oversight.
properties.regulatory_significance: Subject to FCA COBS compliance requirements.

properties.rule_statement: Deposit products must comply with the Financial Conduct Authority's Consumer Rights in Business Standards framework.
Customers must be at least 18 years of age to qualify for the account.

properties.definition: A flexible, easy-access account designed for straightforward savings with easy access to funds
Rates applied to the savings account, characterized as competitive
Target users seeking straightforward savings and easy access to funds

properties.purpose: Provide full digital account access for customers

properties.definition: Account supporting multiple joint account holders
Regular scheduled transfers between accounts
Automated payment mechanism for recurring bills and subscriptions
Payment instrument linked to account for cash and online transactions
business_rules: Used for ATM withdrawals and online purchases

properties.definition: Interest rate that fluctuates rather than remaining fixed
business_rules: Interest is calculated and paid on a monthly basis
Account Opening Method allows Online, Branch, or Postal
Account Tenure is Indefinite until closure

properties.rule_statement: Account must maintain a minimum opening balance of £1
No maximum balance limit applies to the account
Accounts may be opened via Online, Branch, or Postal channels
Interest must be paid to the account on a monthly basis

properties.definition: Framework defining how deposit interest rates are calculated, segmented, and adjusted over time
business_rules: Linked to Bank of England base rate

properties.definition: Foundational interest rate applied to deposit accounts before tier adjustments
Standardized annual interest rate metric accounting for compounding
business_rules: Used as the standard unit for quoting all deposit rates in this structure

properties.definition: Segmented interest rate brackets applied based on customer deposit balances
business_rules: Interest rate increases progressively with higher deposit balances

regulatory_responsibilities: Sets official monetary policy and base rate

properties.rule_statement: Deposit interest rates are reviewed monthly and adjusted in line with the Bank of England base rate

properties.what_it_measures: Upper balance limit for the first deposit bracket
properties.context: Determines eligibility for the base 4.5% AER rate

properties.what_it_measures: Upper balance limit for the second deposit bracket
properties.context: Triggers interest rate uplift to 4.7% AER

properties.what_it_measures: Lower balance threshold for the highest deposit bracket
properties.context: Applies to all balances exceeding £50,000, yielding 4.8% AER

properties.purpose: Documents and maintains the current interest rate structure, tiers, and variation policy for deposit products

properties.definition: Banking product supporting joint accounts with up to two account holders
Account structure supporting up to two signatories with shared access and liability
properties.regulatory_significance: Both holders are jointly and severally liable

properties.definition: Signatory with ownership rights, withdrawal authority, and shared liability on a joint account

properties.rule_statement: Both account holders are jointly and severally liable for the account
Either signatory can withdraw the full account balance
Disputes must be resolved per the standard Complaints Policy
Interest is calculated on the total combined balance of the account
Both signatories are required to be registered at account opening

properties.definition: Process of verifying customer identity, address, beneficial ownership, and source of funds during account opening
business_rules: Mandatory compliance with KYC Verification SOP (KYC-SOP-001)

properties.definition: Process of screening customers against sanctions lists, PEP databases, and adverse media
Individual or business entity subject to identity, address, and AML checks during account opening
Financial record or product subject to opening requirements and deposit thresholds
Official documents used to verify customer identity and residential address

properties.what_it_measures: Minimum deposit amount triggering mandatory source of funds verification
properties.context: Triggers enhanced due diligence during the account opening process

properties.rule_statement: All KYC verification steps must be executed in accordance with KYC Verification SOP (KYC-SOP-001)
properties.enforcement: Operations staff and compliance officers following documented procedures

properties.rule_statement: All customer screening activities must be conducted per AML Policy (AML-POL-002)
properties.enforcement: Compliance and risk management teams following policy guidelines

properties.definition: Process for opening new accounts across multiple delivery channels
business_rules: Processing time must be 1–2 business days for online/branch, 5–7 days for postal

properties.what_it_measures: Time required to complete account opening
properties.context: Applies to online/branch channels (1-2 days) and postal channel (5-7 days)

properties.definition: Required documentation outlining account terms and conditions
Required documentation providing product details

properties.rule_statement: Account opening must follow the standard operating procedure

properties.purpose: Digital channel enabling customers to manage account features, view balances, and configure payments

properties.definition: Instantaneous display of current account funds accessible via digital channels
Chronological record of past account activities and payment executions
business_rules: Data must be retained and queryable for a rolling 24-month period

properties.definition: Instruction to execute regular, fixed-amount payments to a pre-approved beneficiary
business_rules: Fixed amount must remain constant per instruction

properties.definition: Control and oversight of variable payment authorizations granted to third-party payees
business_rules: Must comply with Direct Debit Guarantee rules

properties.definition: Digital delivery of periodic account summaries and transaction records
business_rules: Must be accessible via secure online channel

properties.purpose: Enables teller access for processing customer deposits and withdrawals

properties.definition: Service handling account information requests within branch operations
Service managing card replacement requests
Process for resolving customer disputes
Support function for handling complex transaction queries
Recurring monthly charge for account maintenance
Short-term credit facility allowing withdrawals beyond available balance
Cash withdrawal transactions conducted at Automated Teller Machines
Cross-border payment transfers between accounts in different countries
business_rules: Fixed fee of £5 applies per transfer

properties.definition: Service to issue a physical payment card to replace a lost, stolen, or expired card
Physical payment card linked directly to the account holder's deposit balance
business_rules: No issuance or annual fees apply

properties.purpose: Central reference document outlining fee structures, pricing tiers, and service costs for banking products

properties.definition: A financial holding subject to activity and contact monitoring for dormancy classification

properties.what_it_measures: Period of zero transaction activity and zero customer contact
properties.context: Triggers dormant account status and initiates dormancy procedures

properties.rule_statement: An account is classified as dormant if it experiences zero transactions and zero customer contact for 12 consecutive months
properties.consequence: Triggers dormancy flagging, correspondence to last known address, and operational procedures

properties.rule_statement: Upon dormancy classification, send a letter to the last known address, flag the account in the system, continue accruing interest, and enable full reactivation upon customer request

properties.purpose: Channel for submitting customer-initiated account closure requests

properties.definition: Recurring payment mandate automatically terminated upon account closure
business_rules: Must be cancelled when the source account is closed

properties.definition: Authorized payment mandate cancelled upon account closure
business_rules: Automatically terminated when the linked account is closed

properties.definition: Security trigger for bank-initiated account closure
business_rules: Triggers closure for regulatory reasons or policy violations
regulatory_significance: Mandates immediate action to mitigate fraud or compliance risk

properties.rule_statement: Accounts may be closed by customers or the bank, with specific processing times and notice periods depending on initiation method
consequence: Final balance transferred or cheque sent; all standing orders/direct debits cancelled

properties.what_it_measures: Duration to complete customer-initiated account closure
properties.context: Ensures timely processing and final balance settlement

properties.what_it_measures: Advance notice period required for bank-initiated account closures
properties.context: Ensures regulatory compliance and customer notification before forced closure

properties.purpose: Documented workflow governing account closure processes

key_functions: Support via phone, chat, email, and branch

properties.what_it_measures: Daily availability window for customer service interactions

Number of complaints received from regulatory bodies

properties.definition: Customer segment eligible for premium banking tiers

properties.what_it_measures: Minimum account balance required to qualify for premium tier status

properties.definition: The baseline rate applied to customer deposits or accounts

Optional feature available for current account product

properties.what_it_measures: Total number of accounts issued/active under the product

properties.definition: A credit facility allowing customers to withdraw funds beyond their available account balance
Pre-approved overdraft facility with a fixed interest rate structure
business_rules: Interest rate is fixed at 15% AER

properties.definition: Overdraft usage occurring without prior bank approval or agreed limit
business_rules: Incurs a £5 daily fee for usage

properties.rule_statement: Customers must maintain 6+ months account tenure, earn £1,500+ monthly income, and pass a credit check to qualify

properties.what_it_measures: Maximum borrowing capacity available to the customer
properties.context: Defines the selectable credit range based on customer preference

properties.what_it_measures: Annual Equivalent Rate charged on pre-approved overdraft balances
properties.context: Fixed pricing structure for arranged credit usage

properties.what_it_measures: Annual Equivalent Rate charged on unapproved overdraft balances
properties.context: Higher penalty rate applied to unauthorized credit usage

properties.what_it_measures: Daily charge applied when account is overdrawn without prior approval
properties.context: Penalty fee structure for unarranged overdraft usage

business_rules: Loan amounts must fall between £50,000 and £500,000
Repayment terms are restricted to 2–25 years
Rate determination requires assessment of LTV and credit score

properties.what_it_measures: The minimum and maximum principal borrowing limits for the mortgage product
properties.context: Defines eligible loan sizing parameters for customer applications

properties.what_it_measures: The allowable duration range for mortgage repayment schedules
properties.context: Sets the structural timeframe for loan amortization

properties.what_it_measures: The range of applicable interest rates across fixed and variable product options
properties.context: Rate pricing is dynamically adjusted based on LTV and credit score

properties.what_it_measures: The total number of currently active mortgage accounts in the portfolio
properties.context: Indicates current product uptake and active lending volume

properties.what_it_measures: The aggregate outstanding principal balance across all active mortgages
properties.context: Represents the total capital exposure and asset size of the mortgage book

properties.what_it_measures: The mean principal amount across all active mortgage facilities
properties.context: Reflects typical customer borrowing levels and portfolio concentration

properties.definition: Process for evaluating mortgage applications against required documentation standards
Verification of borrower earnings history

properties.definition: Assessment of collateral property value
Verification of borrower deposit funds
Evaluation of borrower credit history and score
Analysis of borrower income versus expenditure

properties.rule_statement: All underwriting activities must strictly follow the documented standard operating procedure

properties.consequence: Application processing halted or rejected if documentation is incomplete

Physical composition standard for issued cards
